author: Yosinski et al. (2014)
title: How transferable are features in deep neural networks?
why: Bukti fitur awal CNN bisa dipindah antar tugas, dasar transfer learning

author: Ioffe & Szegedy (2015)
title: Batch Normalization: Accelerating Deep Network Training by Reducing Internal Covariate Shift
why: Normalisasi tiap batch bikin training stabil dan jauh lebih cepat

author: He et al. (2015)
title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
why: ResNet: skip connection bikin jaringan super dalam gampang dilatih

author: Iandola et al. (2016)
title: SqueezeNet: AlexNet-level accuracy with 50x fewer parameters and <0.5MB model size
why: Akurasi AlexNet tapi model super mungil, fokus efisiensi parameter

author: Howard et al. (2017)
title: MobileNets: Efficient Convolutional Neural Networks for Mobile Vision Applications
why: Depthwise separable conv bikin CNN ringan buat HP

author: Szegedy et al. (2014)
title: Going Deeper with Convolutions
why: GoogLeNet/Inception: modul multi-skala hemat komputasi

author: Szegedy et al. (2015)
title: Rethinking the Inception Architecture for Computer Vision
why: Inception-v3: faktorisasi konvolusi biar efisien dan akurat

author: Huang et al. (2016)
title: Densely Connected Convolutional Networks
why: DenseNet: tiap layer nyambung ke semua layer berikutnya

author: Xie et al. (2016)
title: Aggregated Residual Transformations for Deep Neural Networks
why: ResNeXt: dimensi cardinality, gabung banyak jalur seragam

author: Zhang et al. (2017)
title: ShuffleNet: An Extremely Efficient Convolutional Neural Network for Mobile Devices
why: Group conv + channel shuffle buat model ekstra hemat

author: Sandler et al. (2018)
title: MobileNetV2: Inverted Residuals and Linear Bottlenecks
why: Inverted residual + linear bottleneck, MobileNet makin efisien

author: Girshick et al. (2014)
title: Rich feature hierarchies for accurate object detection and semantic segmentation
why: R-CNN: region proposal + CNN, awal deteksi objek modern

author: He et al. (2014)
title: Spatial Pyramid Pooling in Deep Convolutional Networks for Visual Recognition
why: SPP-net: pooling piramida biar input ukuran bebas, deteksi cepat

author: Girshick (2015)
title: Fast R-CNN
why: Satu forward pass buat semua region, R-CNN jauh lebih cepat

author: Ren et al. (2015)
title: Faster R-CNN: Towards Real-Time Object Detection with Region Proposal Networks
why: RPN bikin proposal region jadi bagian jaringan, nyaris real-time

author: Redmon et al. (2016)
title: You Only Look Once: Unified, Real-Time Object Detection
why: YOLO: deteksi objek sekali lihat, super kilat

author: Liu et al. (2016)
title: SSD: Single Shot MultiBox Detector
why: Deteksi single-shot multi-skala, cepat dan akurat

author: Redmon & Farhadi (2016)
title: YOLO9000: Better, Faster, Stronger
why: YOLOv2: anchor box + gabung deteksi-klasifikasi ribuan kelas

author: Redmon & Farhadi (2018)
title: YOLOv3: An Incremental Improvement
why: YOLOv3: prediksi multi-skala, backbone lebih kuat

author: Lin et al. (2017)
title: Feature Pyramid Networks for Object Detection
why: FPN: piramida fitur biar deteksi objek besar-kecil sama bagus

author: Lin et al. (2017)
title: Focal Loss for Dense Object Detection
why: RetinaNet: focal loss atasi ketidakseimbangan kelas foreground

author: Long et al. (2015)
title: Fully Convolutional Networks for Semantic Segmentation
why: FCN: CNN full-conv buat segmentasi pixel-wise end-to-end

author: Badrinarayanan et al. (2015)
title: SegNet: A Deep Convolutional Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Image Segmentation
why: Encoder-decoder pakai pooling indices buat upsample efisien

author: Ronneberger et al. (2015)
title: U-Net: Convolutional Networks for Biomedical Image Segmentation
why: U-Net: skip connection U-shape, jago segmentasi data medis kecil

author: Chen et al. (2016)
title: DeepLab: Semantic Image Segmentation with Deep Convolutional Nets, Atrous Convolution, and Fully Connected CRFs
why: Atrous conv + ASPP + CRF buat segmentasi tajam multi-skala

author: Chen et al. (2018)
title: Encoder-Decoder with Atrous Separable Convolution for Semantic Image Segmentation
why: DeepLabv3+: decoder + atrous separable, batas objek makin halus

author: Jaderberg et al. (2015)
title: Spatial Transformer Networks
why: Modul yang belajar transformasi spasial, invarian geometrik
